title: stegostyla alpina
intro: Stegostyla alpina is a plant species native to Australia, also known as the Alpine Finger Lime. It is a type of citrus plant characterized by its finger-shaped fruits, which contain highly acidic juice with medicinal properties. The juice of Stegostyla alpina has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations, wounds, and digestive problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Stegostyla alpina is often prepared as a herbal supplement or added to skincare products, offering benefits such as improved wound healing, reduced inflammation, and enhanced antioxidant protection.
